title: Zwilling Vacuum, La Mer, Fridge Box
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: THE VACUUM CONCEPT: This FRESH and SAVE vacuum box ensures that foodstuff can stay fresh up to 5 times longer when compared to conventional storage and the flavours as well as nutrients in them are preserved. This not only saves time and money, but also prevents foodstuff waste.

FRESHNESS IN VACUUM: Simply seal the vacuum container with the compatible FRESH and SAVE vacuum pumps and in just a matter of seconds. The vacuum sealer stops automatically as soon as sufficient air has escaped.

VACUUM BOXES: The stackable meal preparation boxes are real all-rounders: Irrespective of whether in the oven, the microwave, freezer or fridge, the storage boxes which are made of borosilicate glass will never let you down and are also dishwasher safe. Their modern design means that they are also ideal for serving and also provide a really good overview in the fridge.

SMART MEAL-PREPPING: Every organiser box has a QR code assigned on its lid: Utilising the intelligent ZWILLING app means that freshness status of all prepared dishes can be conveniently tracked via smartphone.
DELIVERY PACKAGE: 1x ZWILLING vacuum refrigerator box, glass (2 L, 24 x 18 x 9 cm), La Mer, material: Borosilicate glass (container), BPA-free plastic (cover), silicone (valve and seal), 1010540.

Air out – freshness in. This is how it works with FRESH & SAVE products: Simply attach the handy vacuum pump to the valve of the vacuum box or pouch and the pump will suck out the air at the push of a button. The vacuum pump is designed to stop automatically as soon as the desired vacuum is reached. Your glass vacuum box in the La Mer colourway Previous page Durable vacuum boxes made of borosilicate glass Do you want more order in your refrigerator? With the clear, stackable vacuum organiser glass boxes, you can see at a glance, which food is being chilled. Glass box Ingenious vacuum technology So simple, so effective: The compact vacuum pump in the fresh design sucks the air out of the FRESH & SAVE boxes. This way, food waste can finally be avoided – goodbye food waste! Vacuum pump Lunchboxes to go For an excursion or for work, the lightweight and shatterproof vacuum lunchboxes made of BPA-free plastic are your best companions: Vacuum-packed, your meals will stay fresh up to 5x longer! Lunchbox Reusable vacuum pouches to the rescue The BPA-free pouches can be sealed, thanks to the zipper & vacuum-sealed with the vacuum pump. It can go straight into the freezer/refrigerator or into the saucepan for sous-vide cooking. Pouch What effect does vacuum sealing have on food? If you store food in the refrigerator, you lose out on quality and freshness. The reason for that is contact with air. Flavours, nutrients & vitamins are preserved significantly longer in vacuum. Vacuum boxes Wine sealer set Full flavor, fruity bouquet? And then pour away the fine red wine after 2 days? Such a shame! We think so too! That’s why ZWILLING designed a vacuum cork with a silicone seal. Vacuum cork Next page Organised meal prepping and an extended shelf life saves you time as well as money. Make the kitchen a stress-free zone: The keep-fresh pouches and storage boxes have a QR code, which you can use to remind yourself when the shelf life is coming to an end in the ZWILLING App in good time. ZWILLING FRESH & SAVE in a new color Air out – freshness in. With the starter sets, you are well prepared for vacuum-sealing your favourite foods. All of the starter sets contain a pump, as well as different boxes & pouches, larger sets have a few more vacuum boxes and extra accessories. Regardless of whether you choose glass or plastic, you are now well equipped for organised kitchen planning and sustainable food storage. All FRESH & SAVE vacuum pumps can be used with all FRESH & SAVE boxes & pouches. Regardless of which line of ZWILLING Fresh & Save you choose, the pumps, boxes, pouches and wine sealers are freely compatible with one another. You can seal the grey boxes with the stylish La Mer vacuum pump – or vice versa. HOW LONG DO VACUUM-SEALED FOODS STAY FRESH? Freshness depends on factors such as initial germ content, preparation hygiene, storage and refrigeration conditions. The ZWILLING App calculates the approximate shelf life based on the food group and storage location (for use as a guideline only). HOW LONG DO WARM FOODS STAY WARM IN THE CONTAINERS OR POUCHES AFTER VACUUM-SEALING? Hot foods are not permitted to be vacuum-sealed and must always be cooled down to at least room temperature beforehand. FRESH & SAVE products do not have any insulating functions and therefore do not keep food warm. HOW DOES THE QR CODE WORK? The QR code links the stored food with the ZWILLING App. Once the food is approaching the end of its shelf life, the app provides a reminder in good time and helps to avoid food waste. DO THE BOXES HAVE A FILLING LIMIT? The valve should not be allowed to come into contact with the box contents, so that the seal functions optimally. That is why the boxes need approx. 1 to 2 cm of space up to the edge for the lid to close properly.
